title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at NoBroker Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at NoBroker Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker Global Group family as a Frontend Developer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
